problem_statement: Implement Bubble Sort to organize Pokémon by their attack stats.

                pokemon_list[j] = pokemon_list[j + 1]
                pokemon_list[j + 1] = ___
    return pokemon_list

# Example inputs
pokemon = [{'name': 'Pikachu', 'attack': 55}, {'name': 'Charizard', 'attack': 84}, {'name': 'Squirtle', 'attack': 48}]
